:::{#lem-deriv-invodds}
#### Derivative of odds w.r.t. log-odds

$$\derivf{\odds}{\logodds} = \odds$$

:::

{{< slidebreak >}}

::: proof

Using @lem-odds-from-logodds and [the derivative of the exponential function](math-prereqs.qmd#thm-deriv-exp):

$$
\ba
\derivf{\odds}{\logodds} 
&= \deriv{\logodds} \exp{\logodds}
\\
&= \exp{\logodds}
\\
&= \odds
\ea
$$

:::

{{< slidebreak >}}

:::{#thm-d_odds-d_logodds}

#### Derivative of odds in terms of probability

$$\derivf{\omega}{\eta} = \frac{\pi}{1-\pi}$${#eq-d_omega-d_eta}

:::

{{< slidebreak >}}

::: proof

Use @lem-deriv-invodds and @thm-prob-to-odds.
 
:::
